creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-12-14 16:54:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/pydf        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    sysutils/pydf/files  patch-pydf pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  pydf is all-singing, all-dancing, fully colourised df(1)-clone
  written in python.
  
  WWW: http://kassiopeia.juls.savba.sk/~garabik/software/pydf/
  
  PR:             ports/118451
  Submitted by:   Baptiste Grenier <gwarf@gwarf.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.960     +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/sysutils/pydf/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/pydf/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/sysutils/pydf/files/patch-pydf (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/sysutils/pydf/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/pydf/pkg-descr (new)
